resources.string: This is used to scan QR codes to add devices and join groups, take photos to generate profile pics and record meals, support AI skip and real-name authentication, and provide more features.

This is used for sharing, downloading golf course maps, taking photos, adding watch faces, saving screenshots, temporarily saving audio files for Voice enhancement, changing profile pics, importing routes, and more.

This is used to track outdoor workouts, view golf course maps and Health community members\' locations, pair devices via Bluetooth, get weather reports on your wearable, obtain weather info to provide workout suggestions, recommend nearby marathon events, and more.
This is used to record sleep, diet log entries, and food names, as well as detect noise using Voice enhancement and more via audio input.
Read call status and mobile network information to provide call services, such as incoming call notifications, pausing workouts/audio prompts, activating cards, and more.
This is used for connected devices, to reject calls, and more.
This is used to sync contacts, as well as set emergency contacts for wearables.
This is used to push missed call notifications to connected devices.
Your exercise records have been synced. Check them out now!
New ECG record. Check it out in the Health app.
This allows the device to send SMS messages when rejecting incoming calls and in other scenarios. This could incur additional fees.
Unable to unpair device here. Unpair it in Bluetooth settings.
This is used to allow broadcasts to be sent to the device.
This is used to provide Calendar reminders for events such as workouts, health check-ups, and more
This is used to calculate step count.
New ECG record. Check it out in the Health app.
You are using Bluetooth to transfer files to your wearable. You can use Wi-Fi to accelerate the process. Wi-Fi acceleration requires the Location permission. Go grant it in Settings >
Huawei Health supports file transfer via WLAN. This requires the Location permission. Grant it in Settings.
A new %1$s (%2$s) needs to be downloaded and updated on your device. Continue anyway?
You have a new blood pressure record. Touch to view details.
Arrhythmia detected, suspected premature beats. Go to the Health app for more details.
Arrhythmia detected, suspected A-fib. Go to the Health app for more details.
Arrhythmia detected, risk of premature beats. Go to the Health app for more details.
Arrhythmia detected, risk of A-fib. Go to the Health app for more details.
This is used to scan, pair, and reconnect to devices.
New arterial stiffness record. Check it out in the Health app.
Unable to download. Touch to retry.
Unable to update. Touch to retry.
Downloading wearable resource update to device…
Unable to transfer wearable resource package update.
This is so you can receive calls on your wearable, pause workouts and audio prompts during incoming calls, activate cards, and use other call-related features.
Device disconnected. To ensure it works properly, open Huawei Health and reconnect.

Open the Health app on your phone and go to Devices, select the device\'s card, and go to Watch connection protection to finish setup. This will help ensure you get WeChat, SMS, incoming call, event, and other notifications.
Make sure to keep the device within %d metres of your phone.
Make sure to keep it properly attached.
Wait till the device temperature becomes normal again.
Blood glucose data not yet available. Check again later.
Blood glucose data unavailable due to device error. Consider getting a replacement.
This device has reached the end of its lifecycle. Please replace it with a new one.
Rapidly rising blood glucose level requires immediate attention. Keep an eye on it and verify with another test later.
Rapidly dropping blood glucose level requires immediate attention. Keep an eye on it and verify with another test later.
Your blood glucose is below the critical threshold of %1$s mmol/L. Please closely monitor your glucose level.
Your blood glucose is below the critical threshold of %1$s mg/dL. Please closely monitor your glucose level.
Your blood glucose is below the minimum set value of %1$s mmol/L.
Your blood glucose is below the minimum set value of %1$s mg/dL.
Your blood glucose is above the maximum set value of %1$s mmol/L.
Your blood glucose is above the maximum set value of %1$s mg/dL.
Make sure to wear your device daily to get the most complete record of your physical health.
Data hasn\'t updated for %1$s days. Open Huawei Health and reconnect the device to update your data.
Data hasn\'t updated for %1$s hours. Open Huawei Health and reconnect the device to update your data.
Wear your band regularly to get continuous data and more accurate insights about your body.
Data hasn\'t updated for %1$s day. Open Huawei Health and reconnect the device to update your data.
Wear your watch regularly to get continuous data and more accurate insights about your body.
Data hasn\'t updated for %1$s days. Open Huawei Health and reconnect the device to update your data.

This is used to track outdoor workouts, view golf course maps and Health community members\' locations, pair devices via Bluetooth, generate e-warranty cards, record device activations, get weather reports on your wearable, obtain weather info to provide workout suggestions, recommend nearby marathon events, and more.
You have completed your step goal for the day
Log in to your HUAWEI ID in Health
Due to system updates, permissions need to be granted again in the Health app for access to all the features.
Your total stand hours today are a little low. View details >>
The Health app needs the Physical activity permission.
Your total roll hours today are a little low. View details >>
Quickly see current and recent step count data.
